case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR VS. CD MAINTENANCE COMPANY, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. (WALGREENS STORE # 900)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-24-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PIANTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, CD MAINTENANCE COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO FURTHER APPEARANCE BY CD MAINTENANCE COMPANY IS REQUIRED. UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS AND DOOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKTIN, MANAGER. DEFENDANT CD MAINTENANCE IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY COLLEN DEERING, CEO. MS. DEERING WAVIES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WALGREE CO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
